name: evmdecompiler
description: Decompile EVM bytecode into human-readable Solidity source code using the evmdecompiler.com API.

interface.longDescription: Decompile EVM smart contract bytecode into readable Solidity source code. Provide raw bytecode and get back decompiled contract code powered by evmdecompiler.com.
defaultPrompt: Decompile the bytecode of the contract at address 0x... on Ethereum mainnet
